description: F&B brands showcase custom catering and event services by featuring completed orders for celebrations, emphasizing personalization and capability to handle special occasions.
structural_recipe: Post high-quality images of completed catering platters or celebration orders. Include caption highlighting the custom nature of the service (e.g., specific product name, client request fulfilled). Emphasize availability for 'all your activities' or events. Include call-to-action encouraging followers to order for their occasions. Feature product details and mention the exclusivity or special preparation involved.
why_it_works: Saudi culture places high value on celebrations and gatherings (weddings, majlis events, corporate functions). Showcasing real completed orders builds social proof and demonstrates capability. Personal customization appeals to desire for bespoke luxury services. Positioning as solution for 'all your activities' taps into event-planning mindset.
transplantation_caveats: Language barrier: Original caption in Spanish; requires Arabic/English localization for Saudi audience
Cultural specificity: Ensure celebration contexts align with Saudi halal requirements and cultural norms
Timing sensitivity: Avoid posting during religious periods that may reduce celebration demand
cultural_constraints: All food items must be clearly halal-certified or explicitly stated
Celebrate occasions should reflect Saudi cultural norms (weddings, corporate events, family gatherings)
Avoid depicting alcohol or non-halal ingredients
